memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int segIndex, unsigned int eIndex, double spacing, double minSpacing, double dendLength, vector< unsigned int > &seglistIndex, vector< unsigned int > &elistIndex, vector< double > &pos)
memberdef.name: addPos

briefdescription.para: Add entries into the pos vector for a given compartment i.

memberdef.argsstring: (Id parentCompt, Id spineProto, double pos, double angle, Vec &x, Vec &y, Vec &z, double size, unsigned int k)
memberdef.name: addSpine

detaileddescription.para: Utility function to add a single spine to the given parent. Returns vector of added spine contents. parent is parent compartment for this spine. spineProto is just that. pos is position (in metres ) along parent compartment angle is angle (in radians) to rotate spine wrt x in plane xy. Size is size scaling factor, 1 leaves as is. x, y, z are unit vectors. Z is along the parent compt. We first shift the spine over so that it is offset by the parent compt diameter. We then need to reorient the spine which lies along (i,0,0) to lie along x. X is a unit vector so this is done simply by multiplying each coord of the spine by x. Finally we rotate the spine around the z axis by the specified angle k is index of this spine.

memberdef.argsstring: (Id obj, const string &field, double val, double len, double dia)
memberdef.name: assignParam

memberdef.argsstring: (ObjId compt, double val, const string &field, double len, double dia)
memberdef.name: assignSingleCompartmentParams

memberdef.argsstring: (const string &name, const vector< ObjId > &elist, const vector< double > &val, vector< ObjId > &mech)
memberdef.name: buildFromProto

memberdef.argsstring: (Id soma, Id dend, Vec &x, Vec &y, Vec &z)
memberdef.name: coordSystem

detaileddescription.para: Utility function to return a coordinate system where z is the direction of a dendritic segment, x is the direction of spines outward from soma and perpendicular to z and y is the perpendicular to x and z.

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< Id > &kids, map< Id, unsigned int > &segIndex)
memberdef.name: fillSegIndex

memberdef.argsstring: (vector< SwcSegment > &segs, const map< Id, unsigned int > &segIndex, const vector< Id > &kids)

memberdef.argsstring: (vector< Id > &spineCompts, vector< Vec > &coords, Vec &parentPos, double pos, double angle, Vec &x, Vec &y, Vec &z)
memberdef.name: reorientSpine

detaileddescription.para: Utility function to change coords of spine so as to reorient it.

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< ObjId > &elist, const vector< double > &val, const string &field, const string &expr)
memberdef.name: setCompartmentParams

memberdef.argsstring: (SwcSegment &self, vector< SwcSegment > &segs, const vector< Id > &lookupId, double len, double L, double pSoma, double eSoma)
memberdef.name: traverseCumulativeDistance

briefdescription.para: Recursive function to fill in cumulative distances from soma.
